summary: Etobicoke North pothole requests rose 28% following the February thaw, with 34 hotspot clusters in the Humber Summit area.
Flooding complaints in Rexdale correlated strongly (r=0.81) with rainfall events above 15mm.
Scarborough Southwest saw elevated pothole reports near Birchcliffe following road salt application in January.
